tasks_completed.description: M1: Converted BULK=false no-dev-report fallback from stage-all to ABORT with failure_code scope_violation
tasks_completed.changes: Replaced lines 124-127: old stage-all fallback text replaced with ABORT directive and structured failure JSON output
tasks_completed.rationale: Stage-all fallback when no dev-report exists allows cross-session contamination; ABORT prevents any staging without a whitelist

tasks_completed.description: M2: Guarded Phase 7 orphan handling for BULK=false — warn+skip instead of commit
tasks_completed.changes: Replaced lines 329-340: unconditional orphan commit replaced with BULK-flag-aware behavior; BULK=false warns+skips, BULK=true references existing bulk orphan skip
tasks_completed.rationale: Orphan files in non-bulk mode indicate cross-session contamination; committing them violates task isolation

tasks_completed.description: M3: Added normalize_ansic_token() function to Layer 1.F Python helper for ANSI-C escape decoding
tasks_completed.changes: Added normalize_ansic_token() function (decodes \xHH, \0NNN, \NNN, \uHHHH, \UHHHHHHHH, standard C escapes) with fail-closed (returns None on decode error). Applied combined $-strip + escape decode to each token before WRITE_ACTION_FLAGS matching. Existing $-strip defense preserved as secondary layer.
tasks_completed.rationale: Python shlex does not expand ANSI-C $'...' hex/octal/unicode escapes; tokens like $'\x2dfprint' bypass WRITE_ACTION_FLAGS matching without normalization

tasks_completed.description: M4: Replaced stale test token bulk-commit-auth-flag-write with bulk-commit-sentinel-write in 16 test files
tasks_completed.rationale: Hook stderr token was renamed but 16 test files still asserted the old token

git_rationale.root_cause_commit: N/A — design gaps identified by codex assessment, not regression
git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: (A) Stage-all was original behavior before M5/M6 whitelist; orphan-commit was designed for bulk but applied unconditionally. (B) shlex limitation is inherent to Python's shlex module. (C) Token rename in hook did not update downstream test assertions.
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: (A) ABORT prevents any staging without whitelist; orphan warn+skip prevents cross-session contamination. (B) normalize_ansic_token() decodes all ANSI-C escape forms before deny matching; combined $-strip+decode catches concatenated fragments. (C) Direct token replacement aligns test assertions with hook output.

diff_stats.justification_for_overage: 16 test files require token replacement (60 of 100 lines); remaining 40 lines are the ANSI-C normalize function (28 lines) plus changelog-analyst text changes (12 lines). Minimum diff constrained by the number of test files and the escape decode function requirements.

dev.qa_notes: AC-01: grep changelog-analyst.md for ABORT and scope_violation (both present); verify absence of 'falling back to stage-all' (confirmed absent). AC-02: normalize_ansic_token correctly decodes hex/octal/bare-octal/delete vectors; bash -n syntax OK; combined $-strip+decode handles concatenated escape fragments. AC-03: grep -r 'bulk-commit-auth-flag-write' tests/generated/ returns 0 matches; 16 files contain new token. AC-04: Phase 7 specifies warn+skip for BULK=false orphans; old unconditional commit text removed. Additionally, codex found and we fixed: (1) concatenated escape fragments now caught via combined normalize, (2) fail-closed returns None instead of original token on decode error.
dev.implementation_notes: Codex adversarial review found two in-scope issues that were fixed: (1) concatenated escape fragment bypass (e.g. -de$'\x6c'ete) — fixed by combining $-strip and decode into single pipeline, (2) fail-closed returning original token instead of denying — fixed by returning None from normalize_ansic_token on exception, caller treats None as DENY. One observation_only noted (old /tmp/claude-bulk-allowed-* fixtures in tests) is out of scope.

self_verification.notes: bash -n syntax check passed. normalize_ansic_token unit tests passed for hex, leading-zero octal, bare octal, delete, exec, concatenated fragments, and invalid Unicode fail-closed. All 4 ACs verified: ABORT present, old stage-all removed, 0 old tokens, 16 new tokens, orphan warn+skip for BULK=false confirmed.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: 3 findings: (1) ISSUE: concatenated escape fragments like -de$'\x6c'ete bypass — PROPOSED_FIX: combine $-strip and decode. (2) ISSUE: fail-closed returns original token allowing command — PROPOSED_FIX: return sentinel/None on decode failure. (3) OBSERVATION_ONLY: old /tmp/claude-bulk-allowed-* fixtures in tests limit test usefulness.
codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Applied fixes for issues 1 and 2: (1) changed decode call to use t.replace('$','') before normalize_ansic_token (combined pipeline catches concatenated fragments), (2) changed except handler to return None instead of original token, caller treats None as DENY. Issue 3 (observation_only) logged but not acted on — out of scope.

recommendations: Update tests/generated/ test fixtures to use /tmp/claude-bulk-commit-sentinel-* paths instead of /tmp/claude-bulk-allowed-* to ensure they enter Layer 1.F (codex observation_only — separate cycle)
